name: Valley Gateway
story: Valley Gateway welcomes travelers into the intelligent alpine mobility ecosystem where nature, smart transportation, and future exploration environments coexist peacefully.

image.alt: MTS Valley 1 Valley Gateway mountain station

name: Lavender Valley
story: Lavender Valley combines floral environments, cinematic transportation experiences, and AI-assisted mobility systems within a calming future civilization landscape.

image.alt: MTS Valley 2 Lavender Valley intelligent station

name: Waterfall Valley (White Lily)
story: Waterfall Valley integrates natural waterfall environments, elegant infrastructure, and intelligent tourism systems into a connected future mobility experience.

image.alt: MTS Valley 3 Waterfall Valley White Lily future station

name: Pine Ridge (Alpine Daisy)
story: Pine Ridge explores elevated mountain mobility, intelligent environmental integration, and peaceful alpine civilization experiences inspired by future sustainable living.

image.alt: MTS Valley 4 Pine Ridge Alpine Daisy elevated station

name: Sunrise Valley (Golden Wildflowers)
story: Sunrise Valley blends golden mountain landscapes, emotionally warm transportation design, and intelligent tourism mobility into an inspiring future civilization destination.

image.alt: MTS Valley 5 Sunrise Valley Golden Wildflowers station

name: Mist Morning (Blue Hydrangea)
story: Mist Morning creates a cinematic mobility atmosphere where intelligent transportation systems move seamlessly through fog-covered alpine environments and floral landscapes.

image.alt: MTS Valley 6 Mist Morning Blue Hydrangea intelligent mobility station

name: Flower Valley Station
story: Flower Valley Station connects intelligent tourism experiences, elegant floral environments, and future-ready mountain transportation systems into a harmonious civilization ecosystem.

image.alt: MTS Valley 7 Flower Valley Station future mobility hub

name: Alpine Garden Station
story: Alpine Garden Station integrates intelligent transportation, luxury alpine tourism, and environmentally connected infrastructure into a peaceful future civilization retreat.

image.alt: MTS Valley 8 Alpine Garden Station luxury mobility environment

name: Cliff Horizon Station
story: Cliff Horizon Station explores cinematic cliffside transportation, intelligent infrastructure systems, and emotionally inspiring mountain exploration experiences.

image.alt: MTS Valley 9 Cliff Horizon Station elevated mobility architecture

name: Grand Alpine Terminal
story: Grand Alpine Terminal serves as the central intelligent transportation gateway connecting alpine districts, future tourism systems, and human-centered mountain civilization experiences.
